tag.desc_cn: 要使用的 HTML 标签

ssr-prerender.desc: Pre-render content on server side if using SSR (use it to pre-render above the fold content)
ssr-prerender.desc_cn: 如果使用 SSR，请在服务器端预渲染内容（使用它来预渲染可见区域的内容）

root.desc: [Intersection API root prop] Lets you define an alternative to the viewport as your root (through its DOM element); It is important to keep in mind that root needs to be an ancestor of the observed element
root.desc_cn: [Intersection API 根属性] 允许您定义一个替代视口作为根元素（通过其 DOM 元素）；需要注意的是，根元素必须是被观察元素的祖先。

margin.desc: [Intersection API rootMargin prop] Allows you to specify the margins for the root, effectively allowing you to either grow or shrink the area used for intersections
margin.desc_cn: [Intersection API rootMargin prop] 允许您指定根元素的边距，有效地允许您扩大或缩小用于交叉的区域

threshold.desc: [Intersection API threshold prop] Threshold(s) at which to trigger, specified as a ratio, or list of ratios, of (visible area / total area) of the observed element
threshold.desc_cn: [Intersection API threshold prop] 触发的阈值，以比例或比例列表的形式指定，表示观察元素的可见区域与总区域之间的比例。

transition-duration.desc_cn: 过渡持续时间（以毫秒为单位，不包括单位）

disable.desc: Disable visibility observable (content will remain as it was, visible or hidden)
disable.desc_cn: 禁用可见性观察（内容将保持原样，可见或隐藏）

default.desc: Default slot in the devland unslotted content of the component
default.desc_cn: 组件的 devland 未插槽内容中的默认插槽

hidden.desc: Slot for content to render when component is not on screen; Example: a text that the user can search for with the browser's search function
hidden.desc_cn: 当组件不在屏幕上时渲染内容的插槽；示例：用户可以使用浏览器的搜索功能搜索的文本

visibility.desc_cn: 当可见性发生变化时触发
